basic_details.job_title: ACBR Delhi Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Center for Biomedical Research
basic_details.short_information: Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Center for Biomedical Research (ACBR Delhi) Recruitment 2026: Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Center for Biomedical Research has released the official notification for 1 Senior Project Associate-I posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Delhi. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s Degree in Natural Sciences/Life Sciences/Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Biomedical Science/Neuroscience/Molecular Biology or equivalent and four years’ experience in R&D in academic/industrial institutions OR Ph.D. in relevant discipline
qualification.details: Master’s Degree in Natural Sciences/Life Sciences/Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Biomedical Science/Neuroscience/Molecular Biology or equivalent and four years’ experience in R&D in academic/industrial institutions OR Ph.D. in relevant discipline.

salary_details.details: Rs. 42,000/- per month + HRA (as applicable as per DST norms)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ACBR Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ACBR Delhi Senior Project Associate-I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ACBR Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ACBR Delhi Senior Project Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ACBR Delhi Senior Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
ACBR Delhi Senior Project Associate-I Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ACBR Delhi to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ACBR Delhi Senior Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ACBR Delhi Senior Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Senior Project Associate-I position at ACBR Delhi is 20th July 2026. Ensure all your details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master’s Degree in Natural Sciences/Life Sciences/Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Biomedical Science/Neuroscience/Molecular Biology or equivalent, along with four years of R&D experience, or a Ph.D. in a relevant discipline.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Project Associate-I post is 40 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government norms, but these are not detailed in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 42,000/- per month, plus HRA as applicable according to DST norms.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Senior Project Associate-I position announced under this recruitment drive by ACBR Delhi.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the ACBR Delhi Senior Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 must be submitted online.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the Senior Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Senior Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview, which can be conducted either physically or online.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Senior Project Associate-I position at ACBR Delhi is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Center for Biomedical Research located?
faq.answer: The Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Center for Biomedical Research (ACBR) is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110007.
